particulars.description: ,. a specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
